description: Lists the image IDs inside Schuylkill County, Pennsylvania mixed-item image group 008116090 — the single browse-only film that bundles three record sets (Wills and Estate Records, Land and Property Deeds, Loose Probate Papers) as separate item sections. Drives the mixed-volume browse (ut_search_images_012): image_search returns the WHOLE film's images in one call (there is no in-volume / item-section filter), so locating the will-book section is manual page navigation. 22 images, sorted by the trailing page number.
